hulls.name: Light
hulls.bio: Fast, fragile, thirsty pool. Fits the Light-Gap shortcut.

hulls.name: Medium
hulls.bio: No gate access, no weakness. The honest default.

hulls.name: Heavy
hulls.bio: Slow, huge pool. Smashes the Heavy-Wall shortcut.

pilots.name: Vex
pilots.note: Upgrades reduce cooldown ONLY — never damage or speed.
pilots.bio: Drains 30 energy from nearby rivals. Cripple the pack, then run.

pilots.name: Sora
pilots.note: Upgrades reduce cooldown ONLY — never damage or speed.
pilots.bio: 1.2s intangible — pass through walls and shots. Take any line.

pilots.name: Kade
pilots.note: Upgrades reduce cooldown ONLY — never damage or speed.
pilots.bio: Next hit steals 25 energy. Turn their boost into yours.

pilots.name: Nyx
pilots.note: Upgrades reduce cooldown ONLY — never damage or speed.
pilots.bio: Spawns a ghost that draws fire for 3s. Vanish in plain sight.

pilots.name: Rhea
pilots.note: Upgrades reduce cooldown ONLY — never damage or speed.
pilots.bio: Shares a shield bubble on coast. The comeback anchor.

pilots.name: Cato
pilots.note: Upgrades reduce cooldown ONLY — never damage or speed.
pilots.bio: Banks one free boost second. For the patient closer.

enemies.name: Marauder
enemies.bio: Cheap, aggressive AI drone. Comes in packs.

enemies.name: Reaver
enemies.bio: Shielded raider that hunts the bounty leader.

enemies.name: Leviathan
enemies.bio: Arena boss. Multi-phase, area denial, the final wall.

holo3d.note: Every icon + roster emblem also ships as a 3D holographic spec — extruded beveled geometry (fills->solids, strokes->tubes) on a projector base. icons/3d/ per HUD icon; characters/<type>/<id>_3d.json per emblem.

ships.note: One prefab per hull; tint + bulk from HullDefinition.

screens.note: energy bar hero + boost/fire/shield/coast chips + minimap + bounty
